descriptionTemplate:
At turn start, obtain 1 stack of {Dreamlure}.
Consuming 1 stack of {Dreamlure} increases the {Counter} for {Keeper of the Lost} and {Necropolis of Dreams} by 5% ATK in this battle.
For every 1% DMG Amplification attribute provided by Wanda and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant, the {Counter} for {Necropolis of Dreams} +0.75%.
